comment.body:
What I get from Alma's post is slow grinding move between support zone ( shock absorbers in place for market to not fall below 5912 -Short Speed + Short Vanna = When stocks fall, dealers are forced to BUY
Negative Zomma = Volatility spikes get absorbed, preventing panic
Time Decay (Charm) = Creates regular buying pressure as options expire). Wait and watch
